The Warrens.description: Oxidised particulate is falling with the condensation. Everything it touches stains brown.

Markets Infinite.description: The boundary between planes feels permeable. Faint sounds from elsewhere. Shadows move wrong.

Sanctum Quarter.description: Pale orbs drifting through the Divine Garden. The Choir says they're benign. Nobody asked them.

Grand Forum.description: Dome thermal regulators offline in this sector. Breath is visible. Pipes are at risk.

Guild Spires.description: Pressure equalisation through narrow vents is producing an eerie whistle across the district.

Outer Wall.description: Gate District is freezing. Wall Quadrant C reports frost on the inner seal. FTA is aware.
